channel.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence Daily
channel.description: Daily financial intelligence snapshot — markets, crypto, macro, construction, housing, jobs, and portfolio

item.title: 📊 Open Financial Intelligence Dashboard
item.description:
📊 Financial Intelligence Dashboard
Interactive charts and analysis — markets, crypto, housing, jobs, construction costs, credit stress, and macro regime scoring. Updated daily by the Nightly Consolidator.
Open Dashboard →

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Monday, May 04, 2026
item.description:
⚠️ DATA PIPELINE ALERT
The Nightly Consolidator ran successfully on Monday, May 04, 2026, but no upstream data was available. All 8 Data Folder input files are missing, which means Tasks 1–8 have not been writing to the Financial Intelligence Data Folder.

Action needed: Verify the upstream scheduled tasks are configured and running. The Data Folder at ~/Documents/AI/Claude/Scheduled Tasks/Financial Intelligence/Financial Intelligence Data Folder/ is currently empty.

A desktop alert was sent. Today's snapshot has no data sections — the dashboard link item above remains live for when data resumes flowing.
📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated 2026-05-04 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator
